title: ETD Stock Tickeron detected bullish Stock Pattern: Triangle Symmetrical Top ETD on August 11, 2025, netting in a 4.82% gain over 3 weeks
author: tickeron_community
selftext: On August 11, 2025, A.I.dvisor detected a Triangle Symmetrical Top Pattern (Bullish) for [Ethan Allen Interiors](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ETD/) ([ETD](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ETD/), $28.85). On August 11, 2025, A.I.dvisor confirmed the Bullish pattern, setting a target price of $30.50. 24 days later, on September 04, 2025, [ETD](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ETD/) reached the target price resulting in a +4.82% for traders who took a long position in the stock.
